description: Curated chart-composition recipes. Strategist binds every visual in Design Spec §5 to one of these. v0.3 adds 6 analytical recipes (sparkline table, box plot, sankey flow, treemap, combo dual-axis, SPC control chart) for a total of 27 recipes covering rank, share, distribution, flow, geo, composition, process, and narrative stories.

recipes.title: KPI Banner Card
recipes.composition: single metric + delta + spark/icon
anti_use: When you need to show distribution
When comparison across categories matters more than headline number

recipes.title: Categorical Comparison (Bar)
recipes.composition: one categorical axis + one value axis; optional secondary series (clustered)

recipes.title: Time-Series Trend (Line)
recipes.composition: continuous time axis + 1-3 value series + reference line

recipes.title: Year-over-Year Variance
recipes.composition: current-year series + prior-year series (clustered) + variance callout
anti_use: Single data point (use card with delta)

recipes.title: Waterfall Bridge
recipes.composition: start value → category increments/decrements → end value

recipes.title: Funnel / Conversion
recipes.composition: ordered stages + monotonic non-increasing values + conversion labels

recipes.title: Matrix Scorecard
recipes.composition: entity rows × (actual / plan / var% / status / trend) columns + grand total

recipes.title: Small Multiples Trend
recipes.composition: one panel per category; shared axes; single line color

recipes.title: Map (Geographic)
recipes.composition: region fill by magnitude OR point overlay with size / color
anti_use: Ranking is the real story (use bar)

recipes.title: Decomposition Tree
recipes.composition: root measure → user-chosen dimension drills → AI splits

recipes.title: Scatter Quadrant
recipes.composition: X measure × Y measure × entity dim; median reference lines form quadrants

recipes.title: Gauge vs Target
recipes.composition: single value + target + min/max arc

recipes.title: Tornado (Sensitivity / Diverging)
recipes.composition: two groups mirror-imaged around zero; sorted by absolute magnitude
use_when: A/B group comparison across many factors

recipes.title: 100% Stacked Bar (Share / Mix)
recipes.composition: per-entity rows summing to 100% split across ≤5 part segments
use_when: Part-to-whole when absolute scale is secondary

recipes.title: Ribbon Chart (Rank-over-Time)
recipes.composition: stacked columns per period with curved ribbons re-ordering by rank between periods

recipes.title: Bullet Chart (IBCS Actual vs Target)
recipes.visual_type: BulletChart (custom) OR clusteredBar with reference lines
recipes.composition: monochrome range bands + actual bar + target tick, 4-6 bullets stacked
use_when: KPI tile replacement when target context matters
anti_use: Range bands coloured as traffic lights

recipes.title: Calendar Heatmap (Daily Pattern)
recipes.visual_type: matrix with conditional background OR Calendar custom visual
recipes.composition: day-of-week rows × week columns, tile coloured by metric intensity
anti_use: Unsigned scale for signed metrics (use diverging)

recipes.title: Pareto 80/20 (ABC Analysis)
recipes.composition: columns sorted DESC + cumulative % line on secondary axis + 80% reference line
use_when: ABC analysis of SKUs / customers / accounts

recipes.title: Dumbbell (Before vs After)
recipes.visual_type: Dumbbell Bar Chart (custom) OR scatter+line composition
recipes.composition: two endpoints per row joined by a connector; rows sorted by absolute change

recipes.title: Histogram (Distribution Shape)
recipes.visual_type: columnChart with pre-bucketed bins OR histogram custom visual
recipes.composition: equal-width bins on X, count on Y, optional mean/median reference lines

recipes.title: Slope Chart (Two-Point Rank Change)
recipes.visual_type: lineChart with two category positions OR custom visual
recipes.composition: two vertical tick columns, one dot per category per side, slope line between
use_when: Two-snapshot comparison with a clear narrative

recipes.title: Sparkline Table (Row-wise Micro-trends)
recipes.visual_type: tableEx / matrix with inline sparkline column OR table + custom Sparkline visual
recipes.composition: rows × (category + value + delta + per-row sparkline); per-row min/max scaling
use_when: Tabular view that still needs shape-over-time
Watchlist where shape matters more than absolute level
anti_use: Shared global Y scale across sparklines
Colouring every delta (defeats the attention filter)

recipes.title: Box Plot (Quartile Distribution)
recipes.visual_type: custom Box and Whisker visual OR composed stacked-bar with whiskers
recipes.composition: whiskers + IQR box + median line + outlier dots, one glyph per category
use_when: Spread / skew / outlier story matters as much as central tendency

recipes.title: Sankey Flow (Stage-to-Stage Attribution)
recipes.composition: left→right node columns connected by thickness-weighted ribbons
use_when: Budget / cost flow across cost centres

recipes.title: Treemap (Hierarchical Share)
recipes.composition: nested rectangles, area = primary measure, colour saturation = secondary measure
use_when: Top-N dominance plus long-tail visible in one glance
anti_use: Flat share with no dominant tile (bar chart reads better)
Binding colour to category (destroys magnitude encoding)

recipes.title: Combo Chart (Bar + Line, Dual Axis)
recipes.composition: columns on left axis (volume) + line on right axis (rate / ratio) sharing the X dimension
use_when: Spend + efficiency ratio for finance reviews
anti_use: Two volume measures (use stacked column instead)
More than one series on the right axis
Omitting the left/right axis annotations in the legend

recipes.title: Control Chart (SPC — UCL / LCL / Mean)
recipes.visual_type: lineChart with reference lines OR custom Control Chart / xViz SPC
recipes.composition: time-ordered series + mean line + UCL/LCL (±3σ) reference lines + flagged out-of-control markers
use_when: Process / quality monitoring with a stable sampling cadence
Ops dashboards for defect rate / latency / throughput
anti_use: Hiding the limits to 'clean up' the chart
Recomputing limits on every filter change (they must be a frozen baseline)
